title: EventTaskType Property
description: Gets the task type of the function that starts with the event.
notes:
When this property is set to 1-NoPause, event handler function is able to be run when other tasks are paused.

When this property is set to 2-NoEmgAbort, the event handler function is able to be run in the emergency stop state.

See Also: EventTaskType Property
